creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #12)
Thanks, that's useful information.  Since we are trying to determine if the bug is in the ASID implementation, let's try updating to r355427 and see if the SError exceptions start happening again.  I think a plain bisection would take longer and there are some revs in between that are known to be unstable, so we might hit unrelated issues.
